name: Peach Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. In a bowl, combine peaches and sugar; mix well and set aside.
3. In another bowl, combine dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, and ground cinnamon.
4. In a large mixing bowl, cream shortening and 1 1/2 cups sugar together until smooth.
5. Add eggs and vanilla to the shortening mixture; beat until well blended.
6. Alternately add the peach mixture and the dry ingredient mixture to the egg mixture, beating until well combined and smooth.
7. Fold in the pecans.
8. Pour the batter into a floured and greased loaf pan.
9. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for about 55 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Turn out onto a rack and let cool before slicing.
